allow:
Bash(cat << 'EOF' > /tmp/commit_msg.txt
refactor: move automation folder under figma and update README

- Relocate automation/poc/ to figma/automation/poc/ for better organization
- Remove generated code.js build artifact
- Update README.md folder structure to reflect actual project layout
- Add missing directories: figma/automation, data/concepts, data/job-search, exports/v1, exports/v2
EOF
git -C /Users/owner/my-portfolio-2026 commit -F /tmp/commit_msg.txt && rm /tmp/commit_msg.txt)

Bash(cat << 'EOF' > /tmp/commit_msg.txt
chore: remove job-search data and update README

- Delete auto-wini interview preparation files \(analysis, questions, prompts\)
- Delete Spring Security JWT study materials
- Remove job-search folder references from README
EOF
git -C /Users/owner/my-portfolio-2026 commit -F /tmp/commit_msg.txt && rm /tmp/commit_msg.txt)

Bash(cat << 'EOF' > /tmp/commit_msg.txt
docs: add portfolio design spec v2.1 and patch guide

- Add portfolio-design-spec-v2.1.md with full Figma design specifications
- Add code-v2.1-patch-guide.md for upgrading code.js from v1.1 to v2.1
- Update local Claude settings with allowed command patterns
EOF
git -C /Users/owner/my-portfolio-2026 commit -F /tmp/commit_msg.txt && rm /tmp/commit_msg.txt)
